label: The Iron Catechism
description: The Iron Catechism operates as a sanctioned arms counter set into Cyrenth Bastion-City’s armored arcade network, its frontage of ribbed ferrocrete and void-black adamantine pierced by narrow, shuttered display slits. Interior walls are lined with recessed weapon racks behind mesh screens, each bay numbered and stamped with Munitorum lot-sigils and quarantine tallies. A compact proofing gallery occupies the rear, its sound-baffled panels and brass-collared vent stacks designed to contain discharge and propellant fumes. Harsh lumen-strips and red auspex indicators keep the chamber in perpetual inspection light, reinforcing the enclave’s culture of inventory discipline and siege readiness.
